business.headline: Salary hike or bonus in hand: Should you invest for returns or repay your home loan?A salary hike or bonus often feels like a reward, but it also brings a tough choice. Should you invest it to grow your wealth or put it towards repaying your home loan faster? Let's find out here.

Mukesh Ambani-led Reliance plans India's answer to Starlink: ReportReliance Industries is exploring a multi-billion-dollar LEO satellite venture under Jio Platforms to build an India-based rival to Starlink. The move could sharpen the satellite internet race as India pushes for domestic space and broadband capacity.

Govt approves ECLGS 5.0 to support MSMEs, airlines amid global tensionsUnder Emergency Credit Line Guarantee Scheme 5.0, the government will offer 100% credit guarantee for MSMEs and 90% for non-MSMEs and airlines.

Confused about ITR filing, refunds or deductions? 'Kar Saathi' has answersFiling your ITR and stuck with questions on refunds or deductions? You're not alone—and now there's an easier way to get help. Could 'Kar Saathi' be the answer you've been looking for?

Memes, reels and trades: How social media hype is driving risky stock betsBillionaire investor Warren Buffett recently said in a podcast that he no longer fully understands parts of today's market and even likened it to a casino for investors. IndiaToday.in spoke to experts to understand whether markets are increasingly being driven by speculation rather than fundamentals.

Why do government employees want Pay Commission every 5 years instead of 10?As part of its continuing exclusive coverage of the 8th Pay Commission discussions, IndiaToday.in has learnt that one of the major suggestions raised during these meetings was to reduce the gap between two Pay Commissions from 10 years to 5 years.

Sensex, Nifty open higher as oil drops on Trump's Iran peace signalBenchmark indices opened higher on Wednesday as lower oil prices and earnings-led moves boosted sentiment. The rise came with caution, as analysts flagged credibility concerns around Iran-related signals and stretched broader-market valuations.

G7 in talks to set up permanent body to oversee critical minerals supplyG7 countries are discussing a permanent secretariat to carry forward critical minerals initiatives beyond rotating presidencies. The talks lay bare differences over stockpiling and leadership as members try to reduce reliance on China.

Ethanol gets price protection, maize doesn't: What's going wrong?The government has set the MSP for maize at Rs 2,400 per quintal. However, in mandis, farmers are often forced to sell at much lower rates.

Cognizant eyes up to 15,000 job cuts, India likely to see biggest impactThe possible job cuts come at a time when many large IT firms are restructuring. Slower spending by clients, rising automation, and the growing use of AI are changing the way companies operate.

Zee files case against Nykaa for alleged misuse of songs, seeks $210,000 damagesZee Entertainment has filed a lawsuit in the Delhi High Court, seeking damages of $210,000. The company claims that Nykaa used several of its copyrighted songs in Instagram reels to promote products to its large online audience.

Sensex, Nifty close lower as record-low rupee, oil worries weigh on marketsThe BSE Sensex fell 251.61 points, or 0.33%, to close at 77,017.79, while the Nifty 50 declined 86.50 points, or 0.36%, to settle at 24,032.80.

Gratuity rises under new labour rules, but what if you quit before 5 years?Gratuity is a lump-sum benefit paid when your employment ends, and most people believe you must complete a minimum of five years to claim it. But that's not entirely accurate.

2% DA hike explained: Only Rs 600 more on a Rs 30,000 basic pay?A 2% Dearness Allowance (DA) hike may sound like good news, but the actual increase in your salary is fairly modest. On a Rs 30,000 basic pay, it adds just Rs 600 a month, so what's behind this small hike?
Biocon founder Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw names niece Claire Mazumdar as successorClaire Mazumdar is currently the founder and CEO of Bicara Therapeutics, a company that was incubated by Biocon.

Sensex, Nifty down: Why is stock market falling today?Markets had opened weak and extended losses through the morning, indicating that the election-led optimism seen in the previous session was short-lived.

Sensex, Nifty bounced back in April. What can investors expect in May?After a broad-based April rally, can markets sustain momentum in May as earnings take centre stage, separating fundamentally strong companies from momentum-driven stocks while global risks continue to cap sharp upside?

Sensex, Nifty slip at open as oil spike and weak rupee unsettle marketsThe BSE Sensex was down 170.40 points, or 0.22%, at 77,099.00 at 9:35 am, while the Nifty 50 fell 65.85 points, or 0.27%, to 24,053.45 as of 9:35 am.

Why Warren Buffett says he doesn't understand today's markets any moreAce investor and former CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, Warren Buffett, said today's market is harder to read, with trading increasingly driven by short-term bets.

Sensex, Nifty today: Will market fall amid weak rupee, elevated oil prices?Markets are headed for a cautious start as weak global cues, elevated oil prices and a soft rupee weigh on sentiment. Election results and quarterly earnings may still shape intraday moves across stocks.

entertainment.headline: CM-in-waiting: How Vijay fandom turned into a political tsunami In Tamil Nadu, Vijay's victory was the culmination of a decade-long script written in cinema halls. We could discuss Vijay's victory, but the real deal is how his fans turned belief into political power.

Rajinikanth meets MK Stalin in Chennai after DMK's poll setback Rajinikanth met outgoing Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin in Chennai on May 6, 2026. Reports said the actor conveyed support and pledged to stand by him in difficult times.

Ektaa Kapoor draws rare link between Akshay Kumar, her father Jeetendra Producer Ektaa R Kapoor compared actor Akshay Kumar to her father, veteran actor Jeetendra, in a heartfelt post. Akshay recently starred in Bhooth Bangla, which was backed by Ektaa.

Raja Shivaji actor Dissha Pardeshi recalls tough 12-hour underwater shoot Raja Shivaji actor Dissha Pardeshi recalled filming a physically demanding 12-hour underwater sequence without the use of a body double. She also shared that the scene was shot without AI or VFX, making it a completely real performance.

Meghalaya rapper Reble talks Dhurandhar fame, women in music, K-pop collab Rapper-singer Reble from Meghalaya, known for Dhurandhar, is making waves in India's independent music scene. In an exclusive chat, she talks about balancing artistic integrity with commercial success and reacts to speculations about her collaboration with K-pop artists and labels.

Sanjay Dutt plans to acquire Vaastav rights, team says it's close to his heart Sanjay Dutt has said work on Vaastav 2 is under way and reports suggest he and Maanayata Dutt are exploring the film's rights. The move keeps another title from his earlier filmography in focus after the Khalnayak sequel announcement.

Vijay-SRK dance clip resurfaces after TVK's win, fans spot Trisha, Sankgeetha A 2013 Vijay Awards clip shows Shah Rukh Khan nudging Vijay into an impromptu dance as Trisha and Sankgeetha watch. The video has resurfaced after TVK's election-winning performance, drawing fresh attention online.

GOAT director Venkat Prabhu, actor Premgi react to viral Vijay 'CM 2026' scene A scene from GOAT showing Vijay's 'TN 07 CM 2026' number plate has gone viral, with Premgi Amaren and Venkat Prabhu reacting. The clip gained traction after Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam's strong poll performance.

Shabana Azmi's cheeky post leaves Vicky Kaushal blushing. See his response Shabana Azmi shared a photo with Vicky Kaushal and teased him about blushing. His shy reply turned the post into a warm, playful moment for fans online.

Bandar: Bobby Deol channels 90s rockstar vibe in new poster, teaser date out Bobby Deol's new poster from Bandar has been unveiled, with the actor channelling a 90s rockstar-inspired avatar. Read to know the teaser's official release date and time.

Shoba Chandrasekhar: Vijay's mother sang his future before it happened After TVK's big win in 2026, Shoba Chandrasekhar sang a line from a song she had recorded for her son Vijay's 2005 film, Sivakasi. The moment turned attention to her long role as the quiet force behind his career and life.

Ranbir Kapoor snaps as paparazzi crowd him, Alia at Daadi Ki Shaadi screening Ranbir Kapoor asked photographers to step back after they crowded him and Alia Bhatt at a Mumbai screening of Daadi Ki Shaadi. Videos from the exhange have surfaced online.

Riteish Deshmukh says children should watch Raja Shivaji to know real history Riteish Deshmukh said Raja Shivaji is bringing families to theatres and performing strongly at the box office. He also urged children to watch the film to better understand history beyond textbooks.

Did Vijay's son Jason Sanjay unfollow him after poll win? Truth behind claim Thalapathy Vijay's son Jason Sanjay came under scrutiny after social media users said he unfollowed his father on Instagram. The claim spread alongside Vijay's electoral win in Tamil Nadu.

Ektaa Kapoor backs Naagin 7 editor after viral goof-up Ektaa Kapoor reacted to Naagin 7's viral blue screen error by introducing and backing her long-time editor. Her posts turned the trolling into a light-hearted defence of a trusted collaborator.

Dhurandhar's Rakesh Bedi 'kills it' with Nora Fatehi on dance set. Video Rakesh Bedi shared an on-set video as he shot a dance track with Nora Fatehi. Their light-hearted exchange comes amid renewed attention on his fan-favourite turn in Dhurandhar: The Revenge.

Prabhas's Fauzi shoot paused after crew member dies in Hyderabad road accident The shoot of Fauzi, starring Prabhas, has been halted after a road accident near Hyderabad left one crew member dead and five others injured. The incident comes as the film nears completion.

Author Jenny Han asks fans to stay away from The Summer I Turned Pretty film set Prime Video and Jenny Han have asked fans to stop sharing the location of The Summer I Turned Pretty film set and turning up during filming. They said crowding and online posts are disrupting production and creating safety concerns for the cast and crew.

Raja Shivaji box office Day 5: Steady weekday hold for Riteish's film, eyes Sairat Raja Shivaji has shown a strong hold over the weekdays as it manages to remain steady on both Monday and Tuesday. The Riteish Deshmukh film may just dethrone Sairat to become the top Marathi grosser soon.

general news.headline: Social media picks Kerala's next CM before Congress, and then war of wordsEven before the Congress high command steps in, social media has already picked Kerala's next Chief Minister, with a heated debate now underway online.

Live: Vijay welcomes Congress MLAs at TVK HQ, seals allianceAssembly Election Result Live Updates: High-stakes deliberations are underway in four states and one Union Territory where the Assembly election results were just announced. In one of the most significant developments since the elections results were announced, Tamil Nadu's single-largest party TVK has confirmed an alliance with the Congress with party chief Vijay being formally handed the letter of support. However, a cloud of uncertainty hovers around the eventual structure of coalition in Tamil Nadu with the AIADMK also throwing its hat into the ring. Vijay, whose TVK won 108 seats in Tamil Nadu, may take oath as the chief minister on May 8. Meanwhile, Bengal continues to witness post-poll violence with clashes reported from several parts, including North 24 Parganas, South 24 Parganas, and Asansol, among others. Several INDI alliance partners have thrown their weight behind Mamata Banerjee after she resigned to step down as the chief minister. Government formation formalities and preparations are also underway in Assam, Puducherry and Kerala amid heightened political activity. Stay tuned to IndiaToday.in for the latest updates on post-poll developments from across the states.

Why Bengal is the spiritual home of the BJPHistory doesn't vanish overnight, it fades when people stop telling it. The West Bengal election's verdict might look political, but beneath it lies cultural memory and a sense of identity. Unlike what people think, Bengal has been the Gangotri of nationalism and early Hindutva, the two pillars on which the BJP and the RSS are based.

Samajwadi Party drops I-PAC plan for 2027 after firm's Bengal, Tamil Nadu lossesWhile the Akhilesh Yadav-led party has never officially announced a formal tie-up with I-PAC, sources within the party said discussions over a possible campaign-management arrangement had been underway for months. Those talks have now reportedly been shelved.

Shoba Chandrasekhar: Vijay's mother sang his future before it happenedAfter TVK's big win in 2026, Shoba Chandrasekhar sang a line from a song she had recorded for her son Vijay's 2005 film, Sivakasi. The moment turned attention to her long role as the quiet force behind his career and life.

LPG new rule explained: Why you may have to give up your cylinderGovernment tightens LPG rules amid global gas supply concerns. Users with both LPG and PNG connections may face penalties or disconnection.

Now, AIADMK planning to support Vijay's TVK, join governmentVijay's TVK has intensified efforts to secure power in Tamil Nadu after emerging as the single largest party with 108 seats in the fractured Assembly verdict. AIADMK sources told India Today that the party is now planning to support TVK, with senior leaders said to be backing the move internally.

'Johnny-Johnny' under fire, UP Minister says nursery rhyme a lesson in lyingWhile delivering his speech, Minister Yogendra Upadhyaya also urged teachers to build a system that imparts values alongside the curriculum. Referring to India's ancient 'Guru-Shishya parampara (mentor-disciple tradition), he said that teachers will be able to generate values among the students only by respecting the ancient order and taking the position of a guru.

China unveils 5th-gen stealth fighter jet, Pakistan likely to get it firstChina has showcased its first operational J-35AE stealth fighter built specifically for export. Pakistan, which has reportedly begun pilot training in China, is the frontrunner to acquire up to 40 of the fifth-generation jets.

Live: Akhilesh Yadav to meet Mamata Banerjee tomorrow, offer moral supportBengal Election 2026 Live Updates: Violence has marred West Bengal's post-election atmosphere, with reports of arson, vandalism, and murder emerging from multiple parts of the state despite a decisive electoral outcome. Clashes and unrest were reported from areas including Kolkata, Birbhum, Howrah, and Baranagar, with political parties trading accusations. The Trinamool Congress (TMC) alleged that BJP cadres hacked one of its workers to death in Birbhum's Nanoor, while police reported vandalism of party offices in several locations. Viral visuals on social media showed mobs armed with sticks chasing and assaulting individuals, with allegations of targeted attacks on TMC supporters and intimidation of local businesses. Tensions escalated in central Kolkata after a TMC office near Hogg Market was allegedly demolished, triggering panic among traders. Amid the unrest, Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar directed strict action against those involved in violence. He ordered continuous patrols and enforced a zero-tolerance policy, warning that anyone inciting or engaging in violence would be arrested immediately. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for the latest updates.

Reopened after 15 years, Bengal Durga temple turns fortress amid post-poll violenceThe Durga Temple in Asansol's Bastin Bazar has reopened after 15 years following BJP candidate Krishnendu Mukherjee's poll promise. Tight security and central forces have been deployed as devotees return amid post-poll tension in West Bengal.

Mamata stalled Teesta pact: Bangladesh ruling party sees hope in BJP Bengal winBangladesh's ruling party congratulated the BJP on its Bengal victory, praising Suvendu Adhikari's leadership. It said the result could improve ties and revive the Teesta agreement, blaming the Mamata Banerjee government for delays and expressing hope the project would now move forward under BJP rule.

CM-in-waiting: How Vijay fandom turned into a political tsunamiIn Tamil Nadu, Vijay's victory was the culmination of a decade-long script written in cinema halls. We could discuss Vijay's victory, but the real deal is how his fans turned belief into political power.

Salary hike or bonus in hand: Should you invest for returns or repay your home loan?A salary hike or bonus often feels like a reward, but it also brings a tough choice. Should you invest it to grow your wealth or put it towards repaying your home loan faster? Let's find out here.
Clouds seen moving away from India. Will it rain again? YesCloud bands have retreated from northwest India as the latest western disturbance weakened and moved east.

Punjab twin blasts: Top cop raises Pak angle, contradicts CM Mann's BJP link claimWhile Punjab's Director General of Police said the blasts were part of a design by Pakistan to cause disturbance, Bhagwant Mann alleged a BJP hand in the attacks. Punjab Police and central agencies have launched an intensive probe, and security has been tightened across the state. No casualties have been reported.

David Attenborough to turn 100: The century in which Earth changed foreverAs David Attenborough nears his 100th birthday, his life's work traces a planet transformed by climate change, extinction and human expansion.

Did Vijay predict his future? 'TN07 CM 2026' number plate from GOAT fuels buzzA clip from Vijay's 2024 film GOAT, showing his vehicle bearing 'TN 07 CM 2026' number plate, is circulating widely on social media following his party's historic electoral debut in Tamil Nadu.

Why did BCCI shift IPL 2026 final out of Bengaluru?Bengaluru was set to host the IPL 2026 final, but the BCCI shifted the title clash to Ahmedabad after local requirements and operational issues forced a late venue change.

Trump-backed Vivek Ramaswamy sweeps Ohio GOP primary, eyes governorshipIndian-origin Republican leader Vivek Ramaswamy, backed by US President Donald Trump, swept the GOP primary with a landslide margin and is all set to face Democrat Amy Acton in a high-stakes Ohio governor election in November.

Too tall for duty? 6.6-ft Telangana bus conductor given alternate role after neck painA 6-foot-tall bus conductor was reassigned out-of-designation duty after his height made bus work physically difficult. The order has drawn attention to workplace adaptability and ergonomic support in public transport jobs.

Unfortunate: Karti Chidambaram on DMK leader's backstabber remark over TVKDefending Congress's decision to support Vijay's TVK in forming the Tamil Nadu government, senior Congress leader Karti Chidambaram dismissed DMK's "backstabbing" charge, saying post-poll coalitions are common in parliamentary politics.

Did Hantavirus jump from rats to humans? The science of zoonosis explainedThe hantavirus cluster outbreak on a stranded cruise ship highlights the growing threat of zoonotic diseases, infections that jump from animals to humans with potentially deadly consequences.

3 dead in arson, clashes in post-poll Bengal; EC directs cops to take strict action LIVEPost-poll violence in West Bengal continued for a second day, with killings, arson and vandalism reported across several districts. The clashes triggered rival accusations, police deployment and an Election Commission order for zero tolerance.

CM-in-waiting: How Vijay fandom turned into a political tsunamiIn Tamil Nadu, Vijay's victory was the culmination of a decade-long script written in cinema halls. We could discuss Vijay's victory, but the real deal is how his fans turned belief into political power.

Rajinikanth meets MK Stalin in Chennai after DMK's poll setbackRajinikanth met outgoing Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin in Chennai on May 6, 2026. Reports said the actor conveyed support and pledged to stand by him in difficult times.

sports.headline: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is ready: RR teenage sensation backed for India debut IPL: Ian Bishop has backed Vaibhav Sooryavanshi for an India T20I debut, naming the teenage sensation as Shubman Gill's opening partner in his alternate squad.

MS Dhoni waiting for one farewell game? Ashwin doubts Thala's IPL 2026 return IPL 2026: Ravichandran Ashwin said MS Dhoni is unlikely to return to CSK's XI this season. With Chennai finding balance and staying in the playoff race, any comeback may be limited to a farewell appearance.

Yuvraj Singh gets special gift from Rishabh Pant, trolls Abhishek, Shubman Gill Yuvraj Singh thanked Rishabh Pant for a lavish birthday gift, then cheekily told his other IPL students to "have some shame" as his playful post and Pant's heartfelt note went viral on social media.

Casemiro backs Carrick for permanent Manchester United manager's job Manchester United midfielder Casemiro has backed Michael Carrick to take charge of the club permanently, saying the former England international has already shown he has the qualities needed to be a great manager at Old Trafford.

Why did BCCI shift IPL 2026 final out of Bengaluru? Bengaluru was set to host the IPL 2026 final, but the BCCI shifted the title clash to Ahmedabad after local requirements and operational issues forced a late venue change.

IPL 2026 final to be held in Ahmedabad, Bengaluru misses out The IPL 2026 final will be played in Ahmedabad despite defending champions RCB originally being in line to host it in Bengaluru. Dharamshala and New Chandigarh will stage the remaining playoff matches after the BCCI's venue reshuffle.

Why Kartik Sharma fits perfectly in CSK's long-term plans? Ex-IND star explains Sanjay Bangar believes Kartik Sharma has found the perfect home at CSK, praising the franchise's backing, security and long-term vision after the youngster's recent IPL 2026 rise.

Akeal Hosein forgotten no more: At CSK, the Powerplay King has found his kingdom IPL 2026, DC vs CSK: Akeal Hosein spent years being world-class and ignored by IPL franchises. Chennai Super Kings took the punt. Now, the Powerplay King is making them look very, very smart.

Sanju Samson is CSK's backbone: Ruturaj Gaikwad grateful after star opener sinks DC IPL 2026: Sanju Samson struck an unbeaten 87 as Chennai Super Kings beat Delhi Capitals by eight wickets in Delhi. The win kept CSK in the playoff race and prompted Ruturaj Gaikwad to call him the backbone of the batting line-up.

Momentum is key: PBKS, SRH look to peak in last leg of group-stage games IPL 2026: Punjab Kings travel to Hyderabad to play their treverse fixture against the SRH. Both the teams will be searching for momentum as they make a final charge to secure the playoffs places.

How can DC be a serious cricket team? Ex-India star slams team after CSK loss Dodda Ganesh questioned Delhi Capitals' selections and tactics after the defeat to Chennai Super Kings. The criticism has intensified scrutiny of the side's combinations, captaincy and fading play-off push.

Arsenal into Champions League final as Arteta hails 'historic' Emirates nightArsenal are back in the Champions League final after 20 years. Bukayo Saka's goal and a disciplined display against Atletico Madrid sealed a historic night for Mikel Arteta's side at the Emirates.

Play of the day: Axar's captaincy disaster class costs DC 2 points vs CSKIPL 2026: Axar Patel's toss call and batting-order gambles unravelled as Delhi Capitals lost to Chennai Super Kings in Delhi. The defeat sharpened scrutiny on Delhi's middle order and on a captain still searching for certainty.

Home (dis)advantage? DC rue unpredictable pitches after 4 losses in 5 gamesDC vs CSK: Delhi Capitals have now lost 4 out of their 5 home games in the IPL 2026. After their latest loss against CSK, Badani rued the fact that the team has not really been able to understand what the pitch is going to offer on a given match-day.

Messi's India tour promoter breaks silence, threatens to sue TMC for 100 croreThe organiser of Lionel Messi's GOAT tour - Satadru Dutta - has hit back at TMC right after the party was ousted from Bengal. Dutta has threatened to sue the party for Rs 100 crore.

Fleming 2-0 Badani: DC coach trolled after CSK clean sweep Delhi in IPL 2026Delhi Capitals coach Hemang Badani faced heavy trolling after Chennai Super Kings clean swept the franchise on Tuesday, in IPL 2026. Back in 2024, Badani had taken digs as CSK head coach Stephen Fleming.

Aryna Sabalenka threatens to boycott French Open over prize money disputeAryna Sabalenka has warned that players could boycott the French Open if the organisers do not increase the prize pool in 2026. Despite the strong stance, Sabalenka expressed hope that negotiations would lead to a resolution.

Didn't want to be selfish: Selfless Samson places team above hundred vs DCIPL 2026: Sanju Samson anchored Chennai Super Kings's chase with an unbeaten 87, prioritising the team's win over a personal hundred against Delhi Capitals. Supported by Karthik Sharma in a match-winning stand, CSK secured a comfortable victory to stay in playoff contention.

Sanju Samson powers CSK's double over Delhi to add spice to Chennai numbers gameIPL 2026, DC vs CSK: Sanju Samson struck an unbeaten 87 to help Chennai Super Kings successfully chase 156 in Delhi on Tuesday and complete a double over the Capitals. With 10 points from as many matches, the Super Kings have joined the season of numbers game in Chennai. 118 for TVK and a possible 16 for the Super Kings is all many down South will be hoping for.

Vinesh Phogat lands in trouble: Wrestler flagged for missing dope testVinesh Phogat has been handed her first whereabouts failure by the International Testing Agency after missing an out-of-competition dope test in December 2025. While not an anti-doping violation, the warning puts her one step closer to potential sanctions under global testing rules.

Pegged back by back-to-back losses, Punjab Kings hunt momentum vs SRHAfter staying unbeaten for more than half of the IPL 2026, Punjab Kings have lost back to back matches. As they take on SRH in their 10th game of the season, assistant coach Brad Haddin hopes that Punjab find much-needed momentum going into the playoffs stage.

IPL tickets scam busted by Hyderabad Police after SRH vs KKR gameHyderabad police arrested three men for black-marketing complimentary IPL tickets during the SRH-KKR match at Uppal. Investigators said forged VIP letterheads were used to obtain passes, exposing a racket around match access.

DC vs CSK: Fit-again Lungi Ngidi returns after mandatory concussion layoffIPL 2026, DC vs CSK: Lungi Ngidi has returned to the Delhi Capitals playing XI after completing his mandatory concussion lay-off, providing a timely boost to the team's pace attack ahead of the clash against Chennai Super Kings.

Does BCCI control ICC? South Africa spinner makes massive allegationSimon Harmer said India's financial muscle gives the BCCI decisive sway over cricket's direction. His remarks came as South Africa's recent rise challenged old hierarchies on and off the field.

Thomas Cup bronze, but no buzz: Chirag, Prannoy seek more respect for badmintonChirag Shetty and HS Prannoy said India's Thomas Cup bronze returned with little recognition at home. They said the muted response makes it harder for players to stay motivated for team commitments.

Riyan Parag's elevation as Rajasthan captain 'makes no sense': Sanjay ManjrekarFormer India batter Sanjay Manjrekar has strongly criticised Rajasthan Royals for appointing Riyan Parag as the franchise's full-time captain for IPL 2026, saying the decision "makes no sense" from a cricketing perspective.

Bengaluru unlikely to host IPL final over MLA ticket issueIPL 2026: BCCI is reconsidering Bengaluru as host for the IPL 2026 play-offs and final amid a political row over MLA tickets. The uncertainty revives questions over venue management as RCB remain firmly in contention.

Ex-India cricketer quits TMC day after BJP sweep, slams outgoing sports ministerBengal's junior sports minister Manoj Tiwary has quit TMC just day after BJP's sweep in Bengal elections. Tiwary levels serious allegations against outgoing sports minister Aroop Biswas.

Arsenal shift focus from Premier League race to Atletico clash in UCL semi-finalArsenal and Atletico Madrid head into their Champions League semi-final second leg at the Emirates after a 1-1 draw in Madrid and reports of fireworks outside Atletico's London hotel. The tie pits Arsenal's control and defensive structure against Atletico's disruptive style, with the result to be decided over 90 minutes.

Virat Kohli told me I'll fit perfectly: Karthik opens up about RCB coaching roleDinesh Karthik said Virat Kohli's backing helped him accept Royal Challengers Bengaluru's batting coach and mentor role after retirement. The move strengthened RCB's support staff and preceded their IPL title.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
